1.moduleName_zh: 可数 vs 不可数名词
1.learning_goal_zh: 在真实语境中正确选用可数/不可数形式，区分 many/much、a few/a little，并纠正常见错误。
quick_reminder_zh: 可数名词有复数（books, computers）；不可数名词不加 -s（water, advice）。
many / a few 接可数复数；much / a little 接不可数。
表示「一些」时：some 可数复数或不可数；a piece of 常与不可数连用。

sections.description_zh: 在短句或小对话中选择正确形式。

questions.prompt_en: At the supermarket: "I need ____ for the soup."
questions.explanation_zh: water 不可数，用 some water；不能说 many waters 或 a water。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 很多学习者会按中文「很多水」直译成 many water，但 many 只能接可数复数。

questions.prompt_en: In class: "She has ____ to share with the group."
questions.explanation_zh: idea 可数，复数 ideas；「几个想法」用 a few ideas。a little 和 much 接不可数。
questions.wrong_note_zh: a little 只能修饰不可数名词，不能接 ideas。

questions.prompt_en: At the café: "There is ____ left in the bottle."
questions.explanation_zh: milk 不可数，用 a little milk 表示「一点牛奶」。a few 和 many 接可数。
questions.wrong_note_zh: a few 后必须接可数名词复数，不能接 milk。

sections.description_zh: 比较相似句子，找出错误并理解正确用法。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is correct?
options: I need some information about the course.
I need some informations about the course.
I need many information about the course.
questions.answer: I need some information about the course.
questions.explanation_zh: information 不可数，没有复数形式，也不能用 many 修饰。用 some information。
questions.wrong_note_zh: information 不能加 -s；many 只能接可数复数。

questions.prompt_en: She gave me many good advices.
questions.answer: She gave me a lot of good advice.
questions.explanation_zh: advice 不可数，没有 advices。表示「很多建议」用 a lot of advice 或 much advice。
questions.wrong_note_zh: advice 和 information 一样，没有复数形式，容易误加 -s。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is correct?
options: There are many books on the shelf.
There are much books on the shelf.
There is many books on the shelf.
questions.answer: There are many books on the shelf.
questions.explanation_zh: books 可数复数，用 many；谓语用复数 are。much 接不可数；many books 与 are 搭配。
questions.wrong_note_zh: much 只能修饰不可数名词；many + 复数名词时谓语要用 are。

sections.description_zh: 根据提示完成或选择最自然的表达。

questions.prompt_en: Complete naturally: "I don't have ____ time today."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「很多」的词组（时间不可数）
questions.explanation_zh: time 不可数，用 much time。many 和 a few 接可数。
questions.wrong_note_zh: time 作「时间」讲时不可数，不能说 many time。

questions.prompt_en: Choose the best reply: "How much rice do you want?"
questions.explanation_zh: rice 不可数，问句用 How much；回答用 a little 表示「一点」。
questions.wrong_note_zh: a few 用于可数，不能用来回答「多少米」。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "There are ____ students in the classroom."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「很多」的词（学生可数）
questions.explanation_zh: students 可数复数，用 many。much 和 a little 接不可数。
questions.wrong_note_zh: students 是可数复数，必须用 many 或 a few 等，不能用 much。

questions.prompt_en: Choose the correct form: "I need ____ to make the cake."
questions.explanation_zh: flour 不可数，用 some flour。没有 many flours 或 a flour 的说法。
questions.wrong_note_zh: flour 和 rice、sugar 一样不可数，不能加 -s 或与 a 直接连用表「一份」。

summary_card.body_zh: 你练习了在情境中区分可数与不可数名词，并纠正了 information、advice 等不可数名词的常见错误。记住：many/a few + 可数复数，much/a little + 不可数；不可数名词没有复数形式。继续在其他模块中应用这些规则吧。

19.learning_goal_zh: 在真实语境中选用恰当的观点表达方式，区分 I think / In my opinion / It seems to me，并纠正常见错误。
quick_reminder_zh: I think / I believe / In my opinion 常用于引出观点；避免重复使用（不说 In my opinion, I think）。
It seems to me that 表示「在我看来似乎……」；From my point of view 表示「从我的角度看」。
观点动词用一般现在时：I think（不说 I am think）；I would say 表示委婉表达。

sections.description_zh: 在短句或小对话中选择恰当的观点表达。

questions.prompt_en: At a meeting: "____, we should start the project next week."
questions.explanation_zh: In my opinion 是固定搭配，表示「在我看来」。不能说 I am think 或 From my opinion。
questions.wrong_note_zh: think 是动词，不说 I am think；opinion 用 In my opinion，不用 From。

questions.prompt_en: In a discussion: "____ that this plan will work."
questions.explanation_zh: It seems to me that 是固定结构，seems 用第三人称单数。
questions.wrong_note_zh: seem 作谓语时主语是 It，动词用 seems；不说 It is seem。

questions.prompt_en: When asked for your view: "____ the new policy is fair."
questions.explanation_zh: I believe (that) 引出观点，动词用原形。believe 不加 -ing 或 am。
questions.wrong_note_zh: believe 是实义动词，不说 I am believe；不说 I believing。

questions.prompt_en: In a survey: "____, online learning is effective."
questions.explanation_zh: In my opinion 是固定搭配。不说 I am of opinion 或 According my opinion。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 表达「在我看来」用 In my opinion；according to 后接他人。

questions.prompt_en: Discussing a film: "____ that the ending was surprising."
questions.explanation_zh: It seemed to me (that) 过去式表示「当时在我看来」。seemed 用过去式。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 主语是 It，动词用 seemed；不说 I seemed that。

questions.prompt_en: Sharing a view: "____ this is the best option."
questions.explanation_zh: I think (that) 引出观点，用一般现在时。think 不加 am 或 -ing。
questions.wrong_note_zh: think 表示「认为」时用 I think，不用进行时。

questions.prompt_en: Giving feedback: "____, we need to revise the draft."
questions.explanation_zh: From my point of view 是固定搭配。opinion 用 In my opinion；point of view 用 From。
questions.wrong_note_zh: point of view 与 From 搭配；opinion 与 In 搭配，介词不同。

questions.prompt_en: Answering a question: "What do you think?" — "____ it's a good idea."
questions.explanation_zh: I would say (that) 委婉表达观点，would 后接动词原形 say。
questions.wrong_note_zh: would 后直接接动词原形，不加 to 或 -ing。

questions.prompt_en: At a conference: "____ that we should invest more in research."
questions.explanation_zh: I believe 表示观点，用一般现在时。believe 不加 -ing，主语 I 时不用 believes。
questions.wrong_note_zh: believe 接 I 时用原形；believes 用于第三人称单数。

questions.prompt_en: Expressing agreement: "____, the plan makes sense."
questions.explanation_zh: From my point of view 表示「从我的角度看」。不说 In my point of view。
questions.wrong_note_zh: point of view 固定搭配 From；according to 后接信息来源。

sections.description_zh: 比较相似句子，找出错误并理解正确用法。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is correct?
options: In my opinion, I think the movie is good.
I think the movie is good.
I am think the movie is good.
questions.answer: I think the movie is good.
questions.explanation_zh: I think 已表达观点，不必再加 In my opinion（重复）。I am think 语法错误，think 是动词。
questions.wrong_note_zh: In my opinion 和 I think 意思相近，不宜连用；think 是动词，不说 I am think。

questions.prompt_en: From my point of view, I believe that we need more time.
questions.answer: From my point of view, we need more time.
questions.explanation_zh: From my point of view 已引出观点，I believe that 多余。保留一个即可。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 多个观点引入语连用会显得啰嗦，选一个即可。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is more natural?
options: I would say that learning English takes time.
I would say learning English takes time.
I would to say that learning English takes time.
questions.answer: I would say that learning English takes time.
questions.explanation_zh: I would say (that) 表示委婉观点，that 可省略。would 后接动词原形 say，不说 would to say。
questions.wrong_note_zh: would 后直接接动词原形，不加 to；I would say 比 I would to say 正确。

sections.description_zh: 根据提示完成或选择最自然的表达。

questions.prompt_en: Complete naturally: "____, the idea is worth trying."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「在我看来」的短语
questions.explanation_zh: 句首用 In my opinion 引出观点，后面直接接从句或名词短语。
questions.wrong_note_zh: I think 和 It seems to me 通常后接 that 从句；In my opinion 后可接名词短语。

questions.prompt_en: Choose the best reply: "What do you think about the plan?"
options: I think it's a good idea.
I am thinking it's a good idea.
In my opinion, I think it's a good idea.
questions.answer: I think it's a good idea.
questions.explanation_zh: I think 是表达观点的常用方式；用一般现在时。避免 I am thinking（表示「正在想」）或重复 In my opinion, I think。
questions.wrong_note_zh: I am thinking 强调「正在思考」，不是「我认为」；In my opinion 和 I think 不宜连用。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "____ that we should wait for more information."
questions.cue_zh: 用委婉表达观点的结构
questions.explanation_zh: It seems to me that 表示「在我看来似乎……」，seems 用第三人称单数。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 主语是 It，动词用 seems；不说 I seem to me。

questions.prompt_en: Choose the correct form: "____, this approach is more effective."
questions.cue_zh: 用「从我的角度看」的表达
questions.explanation_zh: From my point of view 是固定搭配。不说 From my opinion 或 In my point of view。
questions.wrong_note_zh: opinion 用 In my opinion；point of view 用 From my point of view，介词不同。

summary_card.body_zh: 你练习了在语境中选用恰当的观点表达：In my opinion、I think、I believe、It seems to me that、From my point of view。记住了避免重复（不说 In my opinion, I think）、观点动词用一般现在时（I think 不说 I am think）。继续在写作和口语中应用这些表达吧。

20.learning_goal_zh: 在写作和口语中正确选用 for example、such as、for instance、like 等举例表达，并纠正常见错误（如 such like）。
quick_reminder_zh: for example / for instance 可放句首或句中，后接逗号引出完整例子。
such as 和 like 用于列举，直接接名词；没有 such like 的说法。
including 也可用于举例：We have several options, including A and B。

sections.description_zh: 在短句中选择正确的举例表达。

questions.prompt_en: When listing hobbies: "I enjoy sports ____ swimming and tennis."
questions.explanation_zh: 列举具体项目时用 such as 或 like，直接接名词。没有 such like 的说法。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such like 是错误的，应说 such as 或 like。

questions.prompt_en: Starting a new sentence with an example: "____, I like apples and oranges."
questions.explanation_zh: 句首引出例子用 For example 或 For instance，后接逗号。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such as 和 like 通常用于列举，不单独放在句首引出完整句。

questions.prompt_en: In an essay: "Many countries, ____ Japan and Germany, have strong economies."
questions.explanation_zh: 插入语中列举用 such as 或 including。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such like 是错误的。

questions.prompt_en: Describing skills: "I can use software ____ Microsoft Word and Excel."
questions.explanation_zh: 列举时 like 和 such as 都可，直接接名词。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 没有 such like 的说法；for instance 通常后接逗号再接完整例。

sections.description_zh: 比较相似句子，找出错误并理解正确用法。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is correct?
options: I like fruits such as apples and bananas.
I like fruits such like apples and bananas.
I like fruits for example apples and bananas.
questions.answer: I like fruits such as apples and bananas.
questions.explanation_zh: such as 正确；such like 错误；for example 后需逗号再接完整句或短语。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such like 是常见错误；for example 后通常有逗号。

questions.prompt_en: Languages such like English and Spanish are widely used.
questions.answer: Languages such as English and Spanish are widely used.
questions.explanation_zh: 没有 such like，应改为 such as 或 like。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such like 是中式英语常见的错误，应记住 such as。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is more natural?
options: For instance, she enjoys reading and writing.
Such as she enjoys reading and writing.
Like she enjoys reading and writing.
questions.answer: For instance, she enjoys reading and writing.
questions.explanation_zh: For instance 或 For example 放句首引出完整例子；such as 和 like 用于列举名词。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Such as 和 like 后接名词，不能直接接 she enjoys...。

sections.description_zh: 根据提示完成或选择最自然的表达。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "There are many options, ____ option A and option B."
questions.explanation_zh: including 用于列举包含的内容，直接接名词。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such like 错误；for example 通常后接逗号再接完整例。

questions.prompt_en: Choose the best phrasing: "I study subjects ____ math and science."
questions.explanation_zh: 列举名词时用 such as 或 like。
questions.wrong_note_zh: such like 错误；for example 后通常有逗号。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "____, you could try calling the office."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「例如」的短语引出建议
questions.explanation_zh: 句首引出完整建议句用 For example 或 For instance。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Such as 和 Like 后接名词，不能直接接 you could...。

summary_card.body_zh: 你练习了 for example、such as、for instance、like、including 的用法。记住：such as 和 like 用于列举名词；for example / for instance 可放句首，后接逗号；没有 such like。继续在写作中应用吧。

21.learning_goal_zh: 在写作中正确选用连接词（递进、转折、因果、顺序），并避免 although...but、because...so 等重复错误。
quick_reminder_zh: although 和 but 不能同时用；because 和 so 不能同时用（选一个即可）。
顺序：First、Second、Then、Finally 用于组织论述。

sections.description_zh: 在短句中选择正确的连接词。

questions.prompt_en: Adding another reason: "The plan is cheap. ____, it is efficient."
questions.explanation_zh: Moreover 表示递进「此外」，补充另一个理由。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Although 表转折；However 也表转折，这里需要递进。

questions.prompt_en: Expressing contrast: "____ it rained, we went out."
questions.explanation_zh: Although 表示「尽管」，引导让步从句。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Because 表原因；Moreover 表递进。

questions.prompt_en: Showing result: "He was late. ____, he missed the bus."
questions.explanation_zh: Therefore 表示「因此」，引出结果。
questions.wrong_note_zh: However 表转折；Although 表让步。

questions.prompt_en: Ordering steps: "____, we need to plan. ____, we need to act."
questions.explanation_zh: First、Second 用于列举步骤。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Because...So 和 Although...But 是重复错误。

sections.description_zh: 找出连接词使用的错误。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is correct?
options: Although it rained, we went out.
Although it rained, but we went out.
Although it rained, however we went out.
questions.answer: Although it rained, we went out.
questions.explanation_zh: Although 已含转折意，不能再加 but 或 however。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 中文可说「虽然……但是」，英文只能选一个。

questions.prompt_en: Because he was late, so he missed the bus.
questions.answer: Because he was late, he missed the bus.
questions.explanation_zh: Because 和 so 不能同时用，删去 so 即可。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 中文常说「因为……所以」，英文只能选一个。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is correct?
options: The plan is good. Furthermore, it is cheap.
The plan is good. Furthermore it is cheap.
The plan is good, furthermore it is cheap.
questions.answer: The plan is good. Furthermore, it is cheap.
questions.explanation_zh: Furthermore 连接两个独立句时，通常另起一句，后接逗号。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Furthermore 后应有逗号；两句之间用句号或分号。

sections.description_zh: 根据提示选择正确的连接词。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "She is smart. ____, she works hard."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「此外」的递进连接词
questions.explanation_zh: Moreover 或 Furthermore 表示递进，补充另一优点。
questions.wrong_note_zh: However 表转折；Although 表让步。

questions.prompt_en: Correct the redundancy: "Because the weather was bad, so we stayed home."
options: Because the weather was bad, we stayed home.
The weather was bad, so we stayed home.
Because the weather was bad, so we stayed home.
questions.answer: Because the weather was bad, we stayed home.
questions.explanation_zh: Because 和 so 只能用一个。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 可选 Because... 或 ...so，不能同时用。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "____ we tried our best, we did not win."
questions.explanation_zh: Although 表示让步「尽管」。
questions.wrong_note_zh: Because 表原因；Therefore 表结果。

summary_card.body_zh: 你练习了连接词的用法：递进（Moreover、Furthermore）、转折（However、Although）、因果（Because、Therefore）、顺序（First、Second）。记住了 Although...but 和 Because...so 不能同时用。继续在写作中应用吧。

22.learning_goal_zh: 在段落或文章结尾正确使用 In conclusion、To sum up、In summary、Overall 等总结表达，并避免 To conclusion 等错误。
quick_reminder_zh: In conclusion、To sum up、In summary 用于引出总结，后接逗号。
Overall、On the whole 表示「总体而言」。
避免 To conclusion（错误），应说 In conclusion。

sections.description_zh: 在短句中选择正确的总结表达。

questions.prompt_en: Ending an essay: "____, we should invest more in education."
questions.explanation_zh: In conclusion 是固定搭配，表示「总之」。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 没有 To conclusion 或 For conclusion，应说 In conclusion。

questions.prompt_en: Summarizing a report: "____, the project was successful."
questions.explanation_zh: To sum up 是固定搭配，表示「总而言之」。
questions.wrong_note_zh: To sum 和 For sum up 是错误的，应说 To sum up。

questions.prompt_en: Generalizing: "____, the results were positive."
questions.explanation_zh: Overall 表示「总体而言」，直接使用，不加 In 或 To。
questions.wrong_note_zh: 没有 In overall 或 To overall，直接用 Overall。

questions.prompt_en: Concluding a paragraph: "____, we need to take action now."
questions.explanation_zh: In summary 是固定搭配。
questions.wrong_note_zh: To summary 和 For summary 是错误的。

questions.prompt_en: Which phrase is correct?
questions.explanation_zh: In conclusion 是固定搭配，用 In 不用 To 或 For。
questions.wrong_note_zh: To conclusion 是常见错误，受中文「为了总结」影响。

questions.prompt_en: To conclusion, we should work together.
questions.answer: In conclusion, we should work together.
questions.explanation_zh: 应改为 In conclusion。
questions.wrong_note_zh: To conclusion 是错误表达。

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence is more natural?
options: On the whole, we are satisfied with the outcome.
On whole, we are satisfied with the outcome.
In the whole, we are satisfied with the outcome.
questions.answer: On the whole, we are satisfied with the outcome.
questions.explanation_zh: On the whole 是固定搭配，表示「总体而言」。
questions.wrong_note_zh: On whole 和 In the whole 是错误的。

sections.description_zh: 根据提示选择正确的总结表达。

questions.prompt_en: Complete the conclusion: "____, both approaches have merits."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「总之」的总结短语
questions.explanation_zh: In conclusion 或 To sum up 都可引出总结。
questions.wrong_note_zh: To conclusion 和 For conclusion 是错误表达。

questions.prompt_en: Choose the best phrase: "____, the plan is feasible."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「总体而言」的短语
questions.explanation_zh: Overall 或 On the whole 表示总体评价。
questions.wrong_note_zh: In overall 和 To overall 是错误的。

questions.prompt_en: Complete: "____, we have discussed three main points."
questions.cue_zh: 用表示「总而言之」的总结短语
questions.explanation_zh: To sum up 或 In summary 可用来总结已讨论的内容。
questions.wrong_note_zh: To sum 和 For sum up 是错误的。

summary_card.body_zh: 你练习了 In conclusion、To sum up、In summary、Overall、On the whole 的用法。记住：In conclusion 不是 To conclusion；Overall 直接使用。总结句应概括前文，不宜引入新信息。继续在写作中应用吧。
